It's also really interesting to see how powerful the hand gestures are, even in virtual reality, you get a much better sense of personality - I would prefer this to a zoom call interview any day, I think

the juxtaposition of such a serious story and the visuals is really interesting, but I think there is something really powerful and respectful to the interviewee to let them present themself however they want (especially when he gets emotional)
